title: saxifraga stellaris subsp. engleri
intro: Saxifraga stellaris subsp. engleri, also known as Engler's saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae), typically found in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Saxifraga stellaris subsp. engleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and colds, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting benefits.
